data.name: MY WIFE IS A PORN STAR 2
data.detailed_description:
🎥 My Wife Is a Porn Star 2 is a story you experience from the sidelines, watching your wife step by step on her way to fame in the adult industry.

You're not in the center of the action, but you're right there with her. You watch her prepare for a shoot, return home tired or inspired, and gradually change under the pressure of attention, cameras, and the gazes of others. You see her growth, her doubts, her confidence, and you find yourself with conflicting feelings.

This is the journey of an observer: hearing her stories, feeling the tension in the pauses, noticing how fame enters your home. It's not the actions that matter here, but the sensations. You don't control her journey. You experience it with her, remaining the one watching from the outside and trying to understand what's happening to the woman you love.

Features:

💋Hot sex scenes

📣Emotional story

⭐Atmospheric music

❤️Beautiful wife

You'll see her become famous.

And you'll feel what it's like to be the one who sticks around and watches. 💎

data.short_description: 🎥 My Wife Is a Porn Star 2 is an emotional story about a man who watches his wife rise to fame in the adult industry.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 960
  • 儲存空間: 5.3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Dual-Core 2.4 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 1650
  • 儲存空間: 5.3 GB 可用空間
